allow:
Bash(git commit -m "$(cat <<''EOF''
Add branded email verification and Malaysian phone number input

- Create centralized branding configuration (app/Config/Branding.php)
  - All brand colors defined as constants for easy customization
  - Helper methods for common color combinations
  
- Style email verification page
  - Two-column layout matching register/landing page design
  - Display user''s email address on verification page
  - Modern, branded design with feature highlights
  
- Implement custom branded verification email
  - Custom notification with branded messaging
  - Blue color scheme matching website design
  - Professional email templates published and customized
  
- Add Malaysian phone number input with validation
  - Production-ready phone input with +60 prefix display
  - Auto-strips leading zeros and non-digit characters on frontend
  - Backend converts to international format (+60xxx)
  - Proper validation and uniqueness checks
  
- Update User model to use custom verification notification

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
)")
